ddls:
CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the section in which the feature is categorized */,
  "shipped_version" TEXT /* Version in which the feature was shipped */,
  "to_be_removed_version" TEXT /* Version slated for removal from the standard */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes regarding the feature */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the feature was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the feature was last modified */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the feature */,
  "estimated_completion_date" TEXT /* Estimated date for feature completion */,
  "actual_completion_date" TEXT /* Actual date when the feature was completed */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Compliance status with industry standards */,
  "archived" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the feature is archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_features_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES sections ("section_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sections" (
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each section */,
  "section_name" TEXT /* Name of the section */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the section */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the section was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the section was last modified */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the section is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("section_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the version */,
  "estimated_release_date" TEXT /* Estimated date for the version release */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version */,
  "archived" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the version is archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experimental_features" (
  "exp_feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experimental feature */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the feature being experimented on */,
  "is_experimental" INTEGER /* Indicates if the feature is experimental */,
  "experiment_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experimental phase */,
  "experiment_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experimental phase */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the experimental feature */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the experimental feature was approved */,
  "results" TEXT /* Summary of the experimental results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exp_feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experimental_features_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the feature being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the comment is resolved */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_active_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was last active */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency record */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the feature that has dependencies */,
  "dependent_feature_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the feature that is a dependency */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* Type of dependency */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the dependency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_dependencies_dependent_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_dependencies_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "release_notes" (
  "release_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each release note */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the version */,
  "release_note" TEXT /* Text of the release note */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the release note was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the release note was last modified */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the release note */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the release note was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("release_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_release_notes_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status record */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the feature */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the feature */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date of the status update */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the status record was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the status record was last modified */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the status change */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the status change was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_status_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the tag was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the tag was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_tags" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the feature */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated tag */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the tag was associated with the feature */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the tag association was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id", "tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the feature that was changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the change */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role assigned */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the role assignment was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the role assignment was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
